svg.title: SIGNAL
svg.desc: Cover image for the SIGNAL UX framework.

g.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
g.text: A signal is a gesture, token, or action used to transmit information, communicate a command, or serve as a warning.
A UX framework for language-based AI systems
